title: melica minuta subsp. major
intro: Melica minuta subsp. major, also known as small melick, is a subspecies of small perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Melica minuta subsp. major include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, lower blood pressure, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Melica minuta subsp. major include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
